sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7188" key="a)naphro/bios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναπηρ-όβιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n7188.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with maimed life,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0496.tlg001:4D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
